mapper.sql: select o.recharge_id, o.recharge_no, o.user_id, o.plan_id, o.amount_cents, o.bonus_cents, o.total_credit_cents, o.status, o.pay_trade_no, o.paid_time, o.create_time, o.update_time, u.nickname from fish_recharge_order o left join fish_user u on o.user_id = u.user_id
mapper.insert: insert into fish_recharge_order (recharge_no, user_id, plan_id, amount_cents, bonus_cents, total_credit_cents, status, create_time) values (#{rechargeNo}, #{userId}, #{planId}, #{amountCents}, #{bonusCents}, #{totalCreditCents}, #{status}, sysdate())
mapper.update: update fish_recharge_order set status = #{newStatus}, update_time = sysdate() where recharge_id = #{rechargeId} and status = #{expectedStatus}
